name: Preserver Activist ("Preevert")
description: Preserver Youth or Activist Group vigilante — swaggering bully armed thug; poorly trained; calls police when losing. GM quick-generate only.

composition.notes: Average or below average attributes per book.

numberAppearing.notes: Rarely travel in groups of less than four.

weaponProficiencies.notes: One or two modern W.P.s (revolver, pistol, rifle).

horrorFactorMorale.notes: Fail save in firefight or vs Morphus Nightbane — flee or surrender (flee first).

dispositionNotes: White T-shirts with Preserver slogan, leather jackets, black jeans, combat boots; crew cuts or shaved heads.
Bullies — mock and push the weak; deferential to authority figures.
Not used to being shot at — roll H.F. 10 in firefights or vs Nightbane Morphus.
